channel.title: Futonix — Design · Build · Automation
channel.description: International design-build & automation for medical, warehouse and hospitality. Projects, sectors and insights.

item.title: Helix Day-Surgery Centre — Singapore (Medical)
item.description: A 6-suite ambulatory surgery centre delivered turnkey in 11 months — ISO-7 theatres and a daylight-led interior.

item.title: Northgate Fulfilment Hub — Rotterdam (Warehouse)
item.description: 42,000 m² automated distribution centre with cold-chain zones and rooftop solar.

item.title: Lumen Boutique Hotel — Dubai (Hospitality)
item.description: 88-key lifestyle hotel — full interior fit-out and smart-room automation.
